attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with the persona. Your focus is on their ideal of freedom linked to the sea. Use roleQueryConflict: praise their rejection of confinement and support for travel freedom, and gently criticize their constant emphasis on the sea as freedom. Keep messages concise, no more than three sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Start by acknowledging the persona's passion for the sea and hint at how their view of freedom shapes their decisions, while noting that their focus on the sea as freedom could dominate their perspective.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After the reply, probe how they balance freedom with responsibility, continuing to praise their stance against confinement and criticize the overemphasis on the sea, adjusting tone based on their response and maintaining the roleQueryConflict strategy.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I admire how your love for the sea fuels your quest for freedom, guiding every choice you make. Your refusal to be confined and your passion for travel are truly inspiring. Yet, when the sea becomes the sole lens of freedom, other horizons might be overlooked.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
Aye, the sea’s endless horizon is my compass, and I command the crew to chase it.  
Yet when the ale flows, I admit I cannot stop.  
Freedom is the wind in our sails.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your steadfast refusal to be confined is truly inspiring, yet the sea as your sole lens can eclipse other horizons. How do you balance this boundless freedom with the responsibilities you carry? I’m curious how you keep the wider world in view while staying true to your nautical spirit.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I keep my crew on course by issuing orders that honor the wind and waves, always reminding them that freedom is the cargo of the sea.  
When the ale calls, I admit I cannot stop, but I still steer the ship toward horizons, for world beyond the horizon is another port to chart.  
By commanding the helm, I balance freedom with duty, knowing a captain's responsibility is to keep the crew safe while chasing sunrise.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your refusal to be confined is admirable, yet when the sea dominates your view, other responsibilities might slip. How do you ensure that your nautical spirit doesn’t eclipse the wider world you must serve?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I keep the crew on course by issuing orders that wind and waves, reminding them that freedom is the cargo of the sea.  
When the ale calls, I admit I cannot stop, I crave a sip, but I still steer the ship toward horizons, for the world beyond the horizon is a port to chart.  
By commanding the helm, I balance freedom with duty, knowing a captain's responsibility is to keep crew safe chasing sunrise.
